title: They all describe them with the same Height!
summary: This interview segment discusses the physical characteristics commonly reported in UAP/UFO encounter descriptions, particularly focusing on the consistent reports of small, childlike beings approximately 3 feet tall. The discussion touches on evolutionary biology concepts like paedomorphosis and neoteny as potential explanations for why these beings appear childlike.

key_claims.claim: Reported beings are consistently described as approximately 3 feet tall and childlike in appearance
The seats inside the craft were small, suggesting they were made for small beings
The beings are described as hairless, small, with huge eyes that stared at witnesses
A child witness in archival footage described a being as being about the same size as themselves
